title: B@`esht@rah #1203
definition:
Beeshterah = "with increase"

 1) a Levitical city in Manasseh, east of the Jordan; probably identical
    with 'Ashtaroth'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beeshterah = "with increase"

 1) a Levitical city in Manasseh, east of the Jordan; probably identical
    with 'Ashtaroth'

    NASB:  perh. house of Ashtoreth, a Levitical city in Manasseh
